ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production (if applicable) */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement (cubic inches) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle (pounds) */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph (seconds) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Country of origin (1 for USA, 2 for Europe, 3 for Japan) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES vehicle_origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES vehicle_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph (seconds) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the performance metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specs" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement (cubic inches) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Engine code or designation */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Engine compression ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle (pounds) */,
  "weight_distribution" TEXT /* Weight distribution of the vehicle (e.g., front/rear weight ratio) */,
  "payload_capacity" INTEGER /* Payload capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_weights_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle year (e.g., model year) */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Production year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country of origin */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country where the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the vehicle was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)
